data.name: 人間牧場〜更生編〜
data.detailed_description:
榨乳特化逃脫類RPG遊戲！

■故事

在這個公開設立了人類牧場的世界中， 一位不良少女被收容進了其中一所有著更生機能的牧場…

意志堅強且厚臉皮的「愛菜」

究竟能否逃離設施？亦或是逐漸被調教成一頭母牛…！？

■概念

這個關於不停榨奶的遊戲！

喜歡奶子！請推薦這款遊戲給那些喜歡擠大奶子的人！

看著辣妹們在快樂中迷失自我！

■遊戲特色

  • 逃脫類類RPG小遊戲

  • 基本CG有15張

  • 色情事件有16種（包含結局）

  • 7種結局

  • 選擇女主角的行動，探索這個牧場！

  • 回想部屋

data.short_description: 在這個公開設立了人類牧場的世界中， 一位不良少女被收容進了其中一所有著更生機能的牧場… 意志堅強且厚臉皮的「愛菜」 究竟能否逃離設施？亦或是逐漸被調教成一頭母牛…！？
data.supported_languages: 日文, 英文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10/11
  • 處理器: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • 記憶體: 4 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10/11
  • 處理器: 2+ GHz Processor
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL ES 2.0 hardware driver support required for WebGL acceleration. (AMD Catalyst 10.9, nVidia 358.50)
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間

data.name: Human Farm - Rehabilitation
data.detailed_description:
This is a game in which huge boobs are milked incessantly.

It is recommended for those who love huge boobs and girls being milked.

Enjoy watching this sassy gal lose herself in pleasure!

Synopsis

In a world where human farms are publicly set up, one delinquent girl has to be housed in one of the farms, also known as a training facility.

The name of the strong-willed and cheeky girl, is "Aina".

She tries to escape from the facility, but her body gradually adapts as a cow, and...?

Can she escape !?

Huge boobs will be milked ceaselessly!

Staffs try to catch you and punish you!

Enjoy the characters losing themselves in pleasure by the relentless punishments!

One of the cows used to be Aina's best friend!?

You can also enjoy the entanglement of the two!

Explore the farm by choosing your action!

Game Features

  • Escape RPG mini-game

  • 15 basic CGs

  • 16 erotic scenes (including end)

  • 7 endings (including no erotic scenes)

  • Choose the action of the heroine and explore this farm!

Recollection room (erotic scene and end scene)

Open all erotic scenes with a button(end scenes are not included)

data.short_description: In this world where human farms are publicly established, a delinquent girl is taken in by one of the farms for human discipline... Will the strong-willed and thick-skinned "Aina" be able to escape the facility? Or will she gradually be trained into a cow...!?
data.supported_languages: Japanese, English, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10/11
  • Processor: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • Memory: 4 MB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • DirectX: Version 9.0
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • OS *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10/11
  • Processor: 2+ GHz Processor
  • Graphics: OpenGL ES 2.0 hardware driver support required for WebGL acceleration. (AMD Catalyst 10.9, nVidia 358.50)
  • DirectX: Version 9.0
  • Storage: 4 GB available space
